title: White Text?!
excerpt: My team mainly uses the calendar view for our work. Yesterday the titles of our projects turned from black text to white text. The white text is nearly illegible to look at throughout the day. I don’t see a setting to ch…

posts.author: CJG412 (Carly Guy)
posts.cookedHtml: My team mainly uses the calendar view for our work. Yesterday the titles of our projects turned from black text to white text. The white text is nearly illegible to look at throughout the day. I don’t see a setting to change this and changing the theme also doesn’t change the text color. Please help! This is frustrating.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the feedback Carly! I passed along the feedback to the product and design team about this and they said that there is a possibility to turn on “hybrid mode”, so that it’ll be both white and black text (depending on the background color).

Customer support should be able to turn this one for you. You can reach out to our customer support here.
